# Shamwari AI

> Open-source AI built for Africa: a small (1B–7B parameter) language model
> with first-class support for English, Shona, and Ndebele. Built by Nyuchi
> Africa under the MIT licence; runs on affordable Android devices and modest
> GPUs. Free chat tier, paid API tier, MIT-licensed weights.

## Canonical pages

- [Home](https://shamwari.ai/): What Shamwari AI is and who it's for.
- [About](https://shamwari.ai/about): Who builds it (Nyuchi Africa, founded by Bryan Fawcett), why a small model, why Africa-first.
- [Pricing](https://shamwari.ai/pricing): Free, Developer ($19/mo), Business (custom). Open weights are always free.
- [FAQ](https://shamwari.ai/faq): Direct answers on languages, self-hosting, data, hardware, and how Shamwari differs from ChatGPT.
- [Quickstart](https://shamwari.ai/docs/quickstart): Send your first chat completion in under five minutes.
- [Docs](https://shamwari.ai/docs): Developer documentation index.
- [Security](https://shamwari.ai/security): Encryption, isolation, and responsible disclosure.
- [Privacy](https://shamwari.ai/privacy): Data collected, retention, and rights under Zimbabwe DPA + GDPR.
- [Terms](https://shamwari.ai/terms): Acceptable use, MIT licence, governing law.
- [Blog](https://shamwari.ai/blog): Updates and technical notes.

## Brand facts

- Name: Shamwari AI (always capitalized "Shamwari AI"; "shamwari" means "friend" in Shona).
- Built by: Nyuchi Africa (https://nyuchi.africa).
- Founder: Bryan Fawcett.
- Repository: https://github.com/nyuchitech/shamwari-ai.
- Licence: MIT (model weights, training code, platform code).
- Model sizes: 1B–7B parameters; quantized variants run on affordable Android.
- Languages: English, Shona, Ndebele on launch; expanding across Southern Africa.
- Hosting: Vercel (frontend), Fly.io Johannesburg (CouchDB, FastAPI, Doris).

## Developer surfaces

- API base: https://platform.shamwari.ai
- Chat completions: POST /v1/chat/completions
- SDKs: TypeScript (@shamwari/sdk), Python (shamwari).
- Sitemap: https://shamwari.ai/sitemap.xml
- RSS: https://shamwari.ai/rss.xml
